title: Egghead Becomes a Buster Call
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Kizaru, Unknown person #6, Marines, Nami as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That reminds me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A ship left this island yesterday...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should know, I gave the order for it to be hunted down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It was natural to assume...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that some passengers might have had access to information about the void century!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A warship was sent to be safe; the dead make the best secret keepers, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could 'you?! They knew nothing!! None of them committed a crime!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You broke a taboo, vegapunk!! Just like Ohara!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You dug their graves by digging into the past, all to satisfy your selfish sense of curiosity!! You should've kept your greed in check.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Pacificists, remain on the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Everyone else, begin evacuation immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is ship 54! Prepara- Tions are complete, over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ship 21 is also standing by!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: quick, while vegapunk's got their attention...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: High tail it to the vacuum rocket!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go meet up with the others at the back entrance of the Labo- stratum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Right!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: But, Sanji!!! What about vegapunk?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Don't worry, Bonney-chan. I'm not leaving without him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Nami-san, it's me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What's your status up there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We made it to the back entrance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's so noisy though, what's going on at your end?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: LABO- stream

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: They're going to do a buster call?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Gya!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This island's finished!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Back entrance

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Is Luffy Okay?! He's with you, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I lost track of him, but he'll be fine!! Just fill me in on what you guys are doing!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zoro's still off dealing with Lucci!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Ah'm worried sick about Vegapunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We sent jinbe over to get him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So he doesn't get lost.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thankfully, Lilth didn't fall down with the others...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: get rest while you can, Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When lofty, frankly, Bonney, and her were trying to move the sunny.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Brook's gone to help her!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are we cursed to go through multiple buster calls?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Let's hurry and get outta here already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: One problem...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our plan to have vegaforce 01 carry us past the coast...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...Isn't possible anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Emeth
dialogue.text: that robot...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ...was destroyed by Kizaru!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Sailing a ship on land...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...is a simple matter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...When you have my aid)!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're amazing, Bones!! We'll make it to the back entrance in no time!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 51 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
